content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures can be repurposed to dynamically rank and prune the intrinsic curiosity signals generated by ICM (Intrinsic Curiosity Module) and RND (Random Network Distillation), eliminating the noisy, uninformative curiosity that plagues both methods in long-horizon tasks. This creates a hybrid curious agent where memory usage actively shapes what the agent finds worth exploring, rather than exploration only feeding new data into memory.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
